subcodes.title: Words to Madame Scaramuchi, spoken on 1913-02-20
subcodes.first_line: The Cause of Bahá'u'lláh is the same as the Cause of Christ. For example this room is now lighted, but someone comes in and turns off the light
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion
